---
title: "Analysis of Cars"
author: "Your Name"
date: today
categories: [analysis, R]
description: "Exploring the relationship between fuel efficiency and engine displacement."
image: "thumbnail.png"
---

# Introduction

Let's investigate the relationship between fuel efficiency (`mpg`) and engine
displacement (`disp`) from the `mtcars` dataset.

Those variables have a correlation of `r cor(mtcars$mpg, mtcars$disp) |> format(digits=2)`.

## Visualization

Here is a plot:

```r
library(tidyverse)
...
```

## Conclusion

There is a clear negative relationship between fuel efficiency and engine size.
Larger engines tend to consume more fuel.
